description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wardrobe cabinet with a modern design, featuring a combination of vertical doors and horizontal drawers. The main body is finished in a light gray color, with white accent panels on the doors and drawers, and metallic handles for easy access. The cabinet is positioned against a wall, adjacent to a bed and nightstand, suggesting its use as a bedroom storage unit. The structure appears to be made primarily of engineered wood or laminate, with a smooth, hard surface. The doors and drawers provide ample storage space for clothing and personal items, and the handles are ergonomically placed for convenient operation. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for contemporary urban interiors.
description: A tall, modern wardrobe cabinet with gray and white doors and drawers, featuring metallic handles. It is designed for bedroom storage and has a sleek, functional appearance.
description_view_0: The side of the cabinet is visible, showing a solid, flat gray panel with no visible doors or handles.
description_view_1: The front of the cabinet is shown, displaying three vertical doors and two horizontal drawers with metallic handles.
description_view_2: An angled view highlights the depth of the cabinet and the arrangement of doors and drawers on the front face.
description_view_3: The back of the cabinet is visible, showing a plain, unadorned panel with no openings or features.
